author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Edited all 10 files (README + 4 Phase 0 + 5 Phase 1). Changes across all files: replaced em dashes with commas/colons/periods/restructured sentences, removed AI-isms ('at its heart', 'genuinely', 'dramatically', 'fundamentally', 'beautifully'), contracted 'do not'/'is not' to 'don't'/'isn't' for conversational tone, broke up overly polished parallel structures, simplified hedging phrases, tightened sentences throughout.
